languages.text: "Вы и об этом прознали? Нет смысла скрывать, в моих руках действительно оказался артефакт — клинок невероятной мощи. Лария настояла, чтобы я поместил артефакт под охрану и не будоражил солдат. Признаюсь, мне было спокойнее, пока я был им опоясан, но доводы сенешаля были разумнее".

traits.locale_text: Драфт: Интересно, где вы это услышали... Рассказывает, что действительно делает ставку на свой клинок, рассказывает о его особенностях. И говорит, что сейчас клинок под охраной, чтобы не будоражить людей.

languages.text: "Found out about that too, did you? No point in hiding it — I did indeed have an artefact in my possession, a blade of incredible power. Laria insisted that I place the artefact under guard and not agitate the soldiers. I confess I felt more at ease with it in my belt, but the Seneschal's argument was more sensible."
languages.original_text: "Вы и об этом прознали? Нет смысла скрывать, в моих руках действительно оказался артефакт — клинок невероятной мощи. Лария настояла, чтобы я поместил артефакт под охрану и не будоражил солдат. Признаюсь, мне было спокойнее, пока я был им опоясан, но доводы сенешаля были разумнее".

traits.locale_text: "Found out about that too, did you? No point in hiding it — I did indeed have an artefact in my possession, a blade of incredible power. Laria insisted that I place the artefact under guard and not agitate the soldiers. I confess I felt more at ease with it in my belt, but the Seneschal's argument was more sensible."

"Found out about that too, did you? No point in hiding it — I did indeed have an artefact in my possession, a blade of incredible power. Laria insisted that I place the artefact under guard and not agitate the soldiers. I confess I felt more at ease with it in my belt, but the Seneschal's argument was more sensible."

"Found out about that too, did you? No point in hiding it — I did indeed have an artefact in my possession, a blade of incredible power. Laria insisted that I place the artefact under guard and not agitate the soldiers. I confess I felt more at ease with it in my belt, but the Seneschal's argument was more sensible."

languages.text: “你连这个都查到了？也罢，没什么好隐瞒的。我手里确实有件造物，一把威力惊人的利刃。菈丽雅坚持要把那造物严加看守，不让它扰乱军心。说实话，把它悬在腰间会让我更安心，但总领的话更有道理。”
languages.original_text: "Found out about that too, did you? No point in hiding it — I did indeed have an artefact in my possession, a blade of incredible power. Laria insisted that I place the artefact under guard and not agitate the soldiers. I confess I felt more at ease with it in my belt, but the Seneschal's argument was more sensible."

traits.locale_text: “你连这个都查到了？也罢，没什么好隐瞒的。我手里确实有件造物，一把威力惊人的利刃。菈丽雅坚持要把那造物严加看守，不让它扰乱军心。说实话，把它悬在腰间会让我更安心，但总领的话更有道理。”

languages.text: « Décidément, on ne peut rien vous cacher. Inutile de jouer la comédie, j'ai effectivement en ma possession une lame au pouvoir colossal. À la demande de Laria, je l'ai laissée sous bonne garde pour éviter d'affoler les soldats. Pour ma part, j'aurais préféré la conserver à ma ceinture, mais la sénéchale s'est montrée particulièrement convaincante. »
languages.original_text: "Found out about that too, did you? No point in hiding it — I did indeed have an artefact in my possession, a blade of incredible power. Laria insisted that I place the artefact under guard and not agitate the soldiers. I confess I felt more at ease with it in my belt, but the Seneschal's argument was more sensible."

traits.locale_text: « Décidément, on ne peut rien vous cacher. Inutile de jouer la comédie, j'ai effectivement en ma possession une lame au pouvoir colossal. À la demande de Laria, je l'ai laissée sous bonne garde pour éviter d'affoler les soldats. Pour ma part, j'aurais préféré la conserver à ma ceinture, mais la sénéchale s'est montrée particulièrement convaincante. »

languages.text: "Bunu da mı öğrendin? O hâlde saklamanın bir anlamı yok. Gerçekten de elimde inanılmaz bir kudrete sahip bir eser, bir kılıç vardı. Laria, eseri muhafaza etmem ve askerleri kışkırtmamam konusunda ısrar etti. İtiraf etmeliyim ki kemerimde duruyorken daha rahattım ama Seneşal'in argümanı çok daha kuvvetliydi."
languages.original_text: "Found out about that too, did you? No point in hiding it — I did indeed have an artefact in my possession, a blade of incredible power. Laria insisted that I place the artefact under guard and not agitate the soldiers. I confess I felt more at ease with it in my belt, but the Seneschal's argument was more sensible."

traits.locale_text: "Bunu da mı öğrendin? O hâlde saklamanın bir anlamı yok. Gerçekten de elimde inanılmaz bir kudrete sahip bir eser, bir kılıç vardı. Laria, eseri muhafaza etmem ve askerleri kışkırtmamam konusunda ısrar etti. İtiraf etmeliyim ki kemerimde duruyorken daha rahattım ama Seneşal'in argümanı çok daha kuvvetliydi."

languages.text: «También se ha enterado de eso, ¿verdad? No tiene sentido ocultarlo: sí, tuve un artefacto en mis manos, una hoja de poder incalculable. Laria insistió en que hiciera custodiar el artefacto para no agitar a la tropa. Aunque admito que estaba más tranquilo con ella a mi lado, el argumento de la Senescal era más que sensato».
languages.original_text: "Found out about that too, did you? No point in hiding it — I did indeed have an artefact in my possession, a blade of incredible power. Laria insisted that I place the artefact under guard and not agitate the soldiers. I confess I felt more at ease with it in my belt, but the Seneschal's argument was more sensible."

traits.locale_text: «También se ha enterado de eso, ¿verdad? No tiene sentido ocultarlo: sí, tuve un artefacto en mis manos, una hoja de poder incalculable. Laria insistió en que hiciera custodiar el artefacto para no agitar a la tropa. Aunque admito que estaba más tranquilo con ella a mi lado, el argumento de la Senescal era más que sensato».

languages.text: "Das habt Ihr auch herausgefunden, was? Es hat keinen Sinn, es zu leugnen ... ich besitze tatsächlich ein Artefakt, eine Klinge mit unglaublicher Macht. Laria bestand darauf, das Artefakt bewachen zu lassen, um die Soldaten nicht zu beunruhigen. Ich gebe zu, ich fühlte mich wohler, als es an meinem Gürtel hing, aber der Vorschlag der Truchsessin erschien mir vernünftiger zu sein."
languages.original_text: "Found out about that too, did you? No point in hiding it — I did indeed have an artefact in my possession, a blade of incredible power. Laria insisted that I place the artefact under guard and not agitate the soldiers. I confess I felt more at ease with it in my belt, but the Seneschal's argument was more sensible."

traits.locale_text: "Das habt Ihr auch herausgefunden, was? Es hat keinen Sinn, es zu leugnen ... ich besitze tatsächlich ein Artefakt, eine Klinge mit unglaublicher Macht. Laria bestand darauf, das Artefakt bewachen zu lassen, um die Soldaten nicht zu beunruhigen. Ich gebe zu, ich fühlte mich wohler, als es an meinem Gürtel hing, aber der Vorschlag der Truchsessin erschien mir vernünftiger zu sein."

languages.text: 「そうしたことも知ったのですか。隠す意味はありません。確かに、私は神器を所持していました。それは、信じられないほどの力を秘めた刀でした。ラリアは、神器を警備下に置き、兵士たちを動揺させないようにと主張しました。私は、腰に差した方が安心でしたが、家令長の意見の方が理にかなっていました。」
languages.original_text: "Found out about that too, did you? No point in hiding it — I did indeed have an artefact in my possession, a blade of incredible power. Laria insisted that I place the artefact under guard and not agitate the soldiers. I confess I felt more at ease with it in my belt, but the Seneschal's argument was more sensible."

traits.locale_text: 「そうしたことも知ったのですか。隠す意味はありません。確かに、私は神器を所持していました。それは、信じられないほどの力を秘めた刀でした。ラリアは、神器を警備下に置き、兵士たちを動揺させないようにと主張しました。私は、腰に差した方が安心でしたが、家令長の意見の方が理にかなっていました。」
